message:
feat(engine): extend object model with ES2020+ static methods and comprehensive test coverage

Adds the remaining Object static methods required for ES2020+
conformance:

- Object.getOwnPropertyNames(O): returns all own string-keyed property
  names (enumerable and non-enumerable)
- Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(O): returns all own symbol-keyed
  properties
- Object.fromEntries(entries): creates an object from key-value pairs
  (ES2019)
- Object.hasOwn(O, P): ES2022 static method, checks own property
  without walking the prototype chain

Includes 1000+ lines of new unit tests covering property enumeration
order, symbol isolation, prototype chain exclusion, empty-input edge
cases, and interaction with existing freeze/seal/preventExtensions
semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
